Target Date Milestone Workstream Status Notes

May 5 Send Pre-Questions: Video Reskin Impact Video Reskin Upcoming
May 6 Send Pre-Questions: Owners & Donors Video Listening Session Owners & Donors Video Upcoming

Aug 5 Present Site Revisions to Client Website 1.5 Updates Client Meeting
Aug 7 Client Approval on Site Revisions Website 1.5 Updates Upcoming
Aug 11 Push Changes Live Website 1.5 Updates Upcoming
